# API Documentation Template

Use this template when documenting APIs, interfaces, or programmatic
functionality.

## Interface Definition

```typescript
interface ExampleInterface {
  // Type definitions with clear documentation
  property: string; // Description of this property
  method(param: Type): ReturnType; // Description of this method
}
```

## Usage Examples

### Basic Example

```typescript
const example = new ExampleClass();
const result = example.method("value");
```
